layers.title: Sampler Design Context
layers.summary: The repository context gains a dedicated log sampler design entry and expands the logging README to name LogSampler and the lazy AccessRecorder facades. This gives maintainers a source-backed design path before reading the implementation.
layers.diff:
+| design unified class-based random log sampling | `modules/infra/logging/log-sampler-design.md` | `src/datasystem/common/log/*`, `src/datasystem/common/log/spdlog/*`, `src/datasystem/common/metrics/hard_disk_exporter/*`, `src/datasystem/common/util/gflag/*` |
+- `LogSampler` provides unified random hash-threshold sampling across request/access/diagnostic dimensions, with per-request granularity and low-overhead hot-path decisions.
+## Purpose
+
+- Why this design document exists:
+  - record the implementation design for low-overhead request/access/diagnostic random log sampling.
+## Architecture Overview
+
+### Log Processing Flow
+
+Every log emission goes through this sequence:
+
+```text
+1. FATAL/CHECK -> always pass
+2. External API access / client access log -> force emit when request is sampled in; otherwise apply access_sample_rate
+3. ERROR/WARNING/PLOG with request context -> force emit if request is sampled in; otherwise check diagnostic_sample_rate
+4. Request INFO/VLOG -> make one random request-trace decision via request_sample_rate; reuse it for the trace
+5. Background logs -> bypass this sampler and follow existing logging behavior
+```

layers.title: Operator Docs Updated
layers.summary: The user-facing Chinese docs replace the old per-second `log_rate_limit` explanation with three fractional sampling rates. They also document the request-only derivation rule and the new dscli parameters.
layers.diff:
-大流量场景下，可通过 `log_rate_limit` 参数控制每秒采样请求数，避免高频请求日志产生过多磁盘 I/O。
-- `log_rate_limit=N` 表示每秒最多采样 `N` 个新请求（trace）
+- `request_sample_rate` 控制请求链路日志采样率
+- `access_sample_rate = min(1.0, request_sample_rate × 3)` （简称 3r 规则）
+- `diagnostic_sample_rate = min(1.0, request_sample_rate × 4)` （简称 4r 规则）
-| log_rate_limit | int | `0` | 每秒采样请求数上限（0表示不限速）。仅对带 traceId 的请求日志生效：被采样到的请求会完整打印链路日志，未采样请求的链路日志会被整体丢弃（包含 WARNING/ERROR/FATAL）。 |
+| access_sample_rate | double | `1.0` (未显式设置时支持派生) | 接口日志采样率

layers.title: Sampling Proto Schema
layers.summary: The protocol adds `LogSampleConfigPb` and carries it in register and heartbeat responses. This replaces the old scalar `log_rate_limit` register response field with structured ppm values used by clients.

layers.title: Flag Model Replaced
layers.summary: After the schema layer, worker configuration switches from one integer quota to three validated double sampling rates. Dynamic flag updates now commit sampler flags transactionally and publish a LogSampler configuration snapshot.

layers.title: Deployment Values Rewired
layers.summary: The deployment layer follows the new flag model by rendering only explicitly configured sampling rates. Helm values and worker config templates stop passing `log_rate_limit` and expose request/access/diagnostic rates instead.

bcFindings.evidence: `include/datasystem/utils/embedded_config.h` removes `EmbeddedConfig &LogRateLimit(int limit);` and replaces it with `RequestSampleRate(double)`, `AccessSampleRate(double)`, and `DiagnosticSampleRate(double)`.
`src/datasystem/protos/share_memory.proto` changes field 24 from `int32 log_rate_limit = 24;` to `LogSampleConfigPb log_sample_config = 24;`, removing the old public generated accessor.
`src/datasystem/protos/share_memory.proto` reuses field number 24 with a different type, changing the wire/schema type from `int32` to `LogSampleConfigPb`.

layers.title: Limiter Replaced
layers.summary: The build graph removes the spdlog `LogRateLimiter` target and adds common-log sampler targets. This makes LogSampler the shared dependency for logging, proto config, and access-record decisions.

layers.title: Sampler Hot Path
layers.summary: On top of the new build target, `LogSampler` implements immutable snapshot publication, ppm thresholds, request-trace decisions, and per-event access/diagnostic sampling. Runtime log creation and PLOG now consult the sampler before stream payload construction when sampling is enabled.

layers.title: Access Facades Added
layers.summary: Access logging is rebuilt around lazy object, stream, and request-out recorder facades that skip expensive field materialization when sampled out. The previous direct `AccessRecorder::Record` overloads are removed, and the manager/destructor plus helper functions are adjusted for the new ownership model.

bcFindings.evidence: `src/datasystem/common/log/spdlog/log_rate_limiter.h` is deleted, removing the public `LogRateLimiter` class and its methods.

bcFindings.symbol: datasystem::AccessRecorder::Record(StatusCode, const std::string&, const RequestParam&, const std::string&, uint64_t)
bcFindings.evidence: `src/datasystem/common/log/access_recorder.h` removes the `Record(StatusCode, const std::string&, const RequestParam&, const std::string&, uint64_t)` overload.

bcFindings.symbol: datasystem::AccessRecorder::Record(int, const std::string&, const RequestParam&, const std::string&, uint64_t)
bcFindings.evidence: `src/datasystem/common/log/access_recorder.h` removes the integer-code `Record` overload used by direct AccessRecorder callers.
`src/datasystem/common/log/access_recorder.h` removes the stream `Record` overload and replaces stream recording with `AccessRecorder::Stream(...).Record()`.
`src/datasystem/common/log/access_recorder.h` removes `struct AccessRecorderStreamWrap` and replaces it with `StreamAccessRecorder`.

layers.title: Client Config Applied
layers.summary: Client worker registration and heartbeat handling now consume structured sampler config from the worker. The client build links the common log proto so it can validate and apply worker-published ppm settings.

layers.title: Call Sites Lazified
layers.summary: With the facades available, C++, C API, Python, Java, hetero, stream, and etcd call sites move from eager `RequestParam` construction to chained recorder fields. This is the main hot-path integration layer that avoids key formatting, payload summaries, and elapsed-time work when access logs are sampled out.

layers.title: Worker Services Updated
layers.summary: Worker object and stream service handlers are adjusted to the new object/stream recorder interfaces. The request manager now stores object-specific recorder pointers so completion paths can record lazily with the new API.

bcFindings.symbol: datasystem::ExecuteGetArray(void*, const char**, const size_t*, uint64_t, uint32_t, char**, size_t*, size_t*, datasystem::RequestParam*)

layers.title: Core Sampler Tests
layers.summary: New unit and system tests cover sampler distribution, configuration parsing, integration with LOG/PLOG, access-log sampling, and lazy facades. The old LogRateLimiter tests are deleted because the target and behavior no longer exist.
layers.diff:
+    name = "log_sampler_test",
+    srcs = ["log_sampler_test.cpp"],
+
+TEST_F(LogSamplerTest, RandomDistribution)
+TEST_F(LogSamplerConfigTest, ConfigFailureRetainsPreviousGood)
+TEST_F(LogSamplerIntegrationTest, PlogClassifiedAsDiagnostic)
+TEST_F(LogSamplerAccessTest, AccessRateZeroSkipsPayload)
@@
-    name = "log_rate_limiter_test",
-    srcs = ["log_rate_limiter_test.cpp"],
@@
-diff --git a/tests/ut/common/log/spdlog/log_rate_limiter_test.cpp b/tests/ut/common/log/spdlog/log_rate_limiter_test.cpp
-deleted file mode 100644

layers.title: Integration Expectations Updated
layers.summary: Existing tests are adapted to the new random sampler semantics and proto metadata behavior. The RPC metadata tests now validate admit/reject/undecided propagation through `LogSampler` rather than the removed rate limiter.

summary: This PR replaces first-N log rate limiting with a unified random LogSampler, propagates structured sampling config across worker/client paths, rewires access logging for lazy sampled-out behavior, and updates documentation and tests.
